raw_input:
PRODUCT SPEC — NovaPay Digital Savings Account

Product Name: NovaPay SmartSave
Category: Digital Savings & Investment Platform
Launch Date: April 2026
Company: NovaPay Financial Technologies Pvt. Ltd. (SEBI-registered)

PRODUCT OVERVIEW
NovaPay SmartSave is a mobile-first savings account that automatically sweeps
idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than
traditional savings accounts while maintaining instant liquidity.

KEY FEATURES
- Auto-sweep technology: balances above ₹10,000 automatically invested in
  SEBI-approved liquid funds
- Instant withdrawal: funds accessible within 30 minutes, 24/7
- Zero lock-in period
- Integrated UPI payments
- Real-time portfolio dashboard

FINANCIAL DETAILS
- Savings account interest: 4% per annum (RBI regulated)
- Liquid fund historical average: 6.5-7.2% per annum (last 3 years, source: AMFI data)
- Minimum balance: ₹1,000
- Auto-sweep threshold: configurable between ₹5,000 and ₹50,000

REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
- SEBI registration: INZ000XXXXXX
- RBI banking licence: partnered with SBM Bank India
- All mutual fund investments through AMFI-registered AMCs

TARGET AUDIENCE
- Urban millennials (25-38 years)
- First-time investors
- Salaried professionals seeking passive wealth growth

COMPETITIVE POSITIONING
- Versus traditional FD: higher liquidity, comparable returns
- Versus other neo-banks: automated investment (no manual action needed)

LAUNCH MARKETS
- Phase 1: Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Delhi NCR
- Phase 2: Tier-2 cities (Q3 2026)

blog_post:
**NovaPay SmartSave: A Mobile-First Savings Account with Higher Returns**

NovaPay SmartSave, a mobile-first savings account, aims to provide a new way for Indians to save and invest their money. According to its product spec, NovaPay SmartSave is a SEBI-registered savings account that automatically sweeps idle balances into liquid mutual funds, offering customers higher returns than traditional savings accounts.

**Key Features of NovaPay SmartSave**

NovaPay SmartSave offers a range of features that make it an attractive option for savers and investors alike. With a minimum balance of ₹1,000, customers can start saving and investing with ease. The account also offers a savings account interest of 4% per annum, which is higher than many traditional savings accounts. Additionally, NovaPay SmartSave has partnered with SBM Bank India, providing customers with a secure and reliable banking experience.

**Investment Returns with NovaPay SmartSave**

While traditional savings accounts offer a fixed interest rate, NovaPay SmartSave offers customers the opportunity to earn higher returns through its automated investment feature. According to the product spec, liquid fund historical averages have been around 6.5-7.2% per annum for the last 3 years. Customers may be able to earn higher returns on their idle balances with NovaPay SmartSave, depending on market conditions.

**Availability and Launch Plans**

NovaPay SmartSave is planned to be launched in Phase 1 in Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Delhi NCR, with a future expansion to Tier-2 cities in Q3 2026. Please note that launch plans are subject to change. This widespread availability will make it easier for customers to access the service and start saving and investing. With its mobile-first approach, NovaPay SmartSave is poised to make a significant impact in the Indian savings and investment market.

**Consult a SEBI-registered investment advisor before investing.**

violations.description: This sentence implies that NovaPay SmartSave is a new way to save and invest, but the research brief only verifies the product spec, not its uniqueness.
violations.rewrite_suggestion: NovaPay SmartSave, a mobile-first savings account, offers a new way for Indians to save and invest, as per its product spec.

violations.sentence: NovaPay SmartSave offers customers higher returns than traditional savings accounts.
violations.description: This sentence implies certainty, but the research brief only verifies that NovaPay SmartSave offers higher returns through its automated investment feature, which may not always be the case.
violations.rewrite_suggestion: NovaPay SmartSave offers customers the opportunity to earn higher returns through its automated investment feature, depending on market conditions.

violations.sentence: NovaPay SmartSave will be launched in Phase 1 in Mumbai, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, and Delhi NCR, with a future expansion to Tier-2 cities in Q3 2026.
violations.description: This sentence implies that the launch plans are set in stone, but the research brief notes that launch plans are subject to change.

violations.sentence: Please note that launch plans are subject to change.
violations.description: This sentence is a required disclaimer, but it should be placed at the beginning of the article, not buried at the end.
violations.rewrite_suggestion: Disclaimer: Launch plans are subject to change. This article is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice.

violations.sentence: With its mobile-first approach, NovaPay SmartSave is poised to make a significant impact in the Indian savings and investment market.
violations.description: This sentence implies that NovaPay SmartSave will definitely make a significant impact, but the research brief only verifies the product spec, not its potential impact.
violations.rewrite_suggestion: NovaPay SmartSave's mobile-first approach may make it a significant player in the Indian savings and investment market, as per its product spec.

hindi_content: NovaPay SmartSave का परिचय, एक डिजिटल बचत खाता जो लिक्विड म्यूचुअल फंड्स में निष्क्रिय संतुलन को स्वचालित रूप से निवेश करता है। यह नवीन उत्पाद, तुलनात्मक रूप से उच्च रिटर्न प्रदान करता है, जिससे यह शहरी मिलेनियल, पहली बार के निवेशक और वेतनभोगी पेशेवरों के लिए उपयुक्त है।
tamil_content: நோவாபே ஸ்மார்ட்ஸேவ் என்பது ஒரு திறன்பேசியில் இருக்கும் ஒரு நிதிச் சாவடி ஆகும். இது செலவுக்கு மீதான விகிதத்தில் இருந்து இடைவிடாது நீடிக்கும் நீர்ம நிதி நிதியில் இருக்கும் மீதான விகிதத்தை விட அதிகமாக வழங்குகிறது. இது நகர்ப்புற மில்லினியர்கள், முதல் முறையாக நிதியின் மூலம் பங்கு வைப்பவர்கள், மற்றும் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் பொருத்தமானது.
